product_surfaces: production MCP stdio JSON-RPC tools/call path for read tools
production CLI read command JSON paths with --format json and --repo
shared cache-backed service canonical payload constructors
SQLite fixture cache, index chunk, sync status, warning, pagination, and typed error read paths
freshness: current source/build/runtime evidence required; run.sh copies the repository to a temporary workspace, injects offline validation tests only in the temporary copy, and runs targeted Go parity tests plus go test ./... and git diff --check
mocks_used: No external provider mocks are used. The validation seeds a sanitized offline SQLite fixture cache and exercises production CLI, MCP JSON-RPC, service, cache, and index paths with live validation disabled.
